mapper.select: SELECT COURSE_NO AS courseNo , COURSE_NM AS courseNm , COURSE_INFO AS courseInfo , COURSE_PATH_NM AS coursePathNm , COURSE_DSTNC AS courseDstnc , COURSE_REQ_TM AS courseReqTm , COURSE_INQ_CNT AS courseInqCnt FROM COURSE WHERE COURSE_NO = #{courseNo}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE (COURSE_NO, COURSE_NM, COURSE_INFO, COURSE_PATH_NM, COURSE_DSTNC, COURSE_REQ_TM) VALUES (SEQ_COURSE_NO.NEXTVAL, #{courseNm}, #{courseInfo}, #{coursePathNm}, #{courseDstnc}, #{courseReqTm})
mapper.select: SELECT CT.COURSE_NO AS courseNo , CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID AS tripContsId , CT.CT_ORDER AS stepOrder , T.TRIP_NM AS tripNm , T.TRIP_ADDR AS tripAddr , T.TRIP_PATH_NM AS tripImgUrl , T.TRIP_LAT AS tripLat , T.TRIP_LOT AS tripLot FROM COURSE_TRIP CT JOIN TRIP T ON CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID = T.TRIP_CONTS_ID WHERE CT.COURSE_NO = #{courseNo} ORDER BY CT.CT_ORDER ASC

SELECT CT.COURSE_NO AS courseNo , CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID AS tripContsId , CT.CT_ORDER AS stepOrder , T.TRIP_NM AS tripNm , T.TRIP_LAT AS tripLat , T.TRIP_LOT AS tripLot FROM COURSE_TRIP CT JOIN TRIP T ON CT.TRIP_CONTS_ID = T.TRIP_CONTS_ID WHERE CT.COURSE_NO = #{courseNo} ORDER BY CT.CT_ORDER ASC

SELECT C.COURSE_NO AS courseNo , C.COURSE_NM AS courseNm , C.COURSE_INFO AS courseInfo , C.COURSE_DSTNC AS courseDstnc , C.COURSE_REQ_TM AS courseReqTm , C.COURSE_INQ_CNT AS courseInqCnt FROM COURSE C JOIN RELATION R ON C.COURSE_NO = R.COURSE_NO WHERE R.USER_NO = #{userNo} AND R.REL_CLSF = 10 ORDER BY C.COURSE_NO DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO COURSE_TRIP (COURSE_NO, TRIP_CONTS_ID, CT_ORDER) VALUES (#{courseNo}, #{tripContsId}, #{stepOrder})
INSERT INTO RELATION (USER_NO, COURSE_NO, REL_CLSF) VALUES (#{userNo}, #{courseNo}, #{relClsf})
